Shoppers 'in love with' Tesco's new Christmas range - with prices from 50p

Customers can't get enough of the cuddly character

Comments1
What's On
Emma Gill Parents editor
07:09, 30 Nov 2024

We all know how popular Aldi's Kevin the Carrot has become, but there's a new Christmas character on the supermarket scene and customers can't enough of him.

Article continues below

Tesco's Abominable Snowman range has hit stores in time for the festive season and features everything from soft toys and Christmas stockings, to duvets and cushions.

Article continues below
Neuropathy (Nerve Pain)? Do This Immediately (Watch)Nerve Research |
SponsoredSponsored
Undo

In fact there are more than 35 products featuring the jolly snowman, across food, homeware and clothing.

Article continues below

READ MORE: We tasted mince pies from every supermarket - this 21p one was star of the show

Shoppers can pick up sweet treats such as the white chocolate character hollow figure, white chocolate truffles, pillowy soft coconut mallows and Abominable Snowman topped cupcakes.

You May Like

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and third parties based on our knowledge of you. More info

A particular highlight is the Shortbread Biscuit Snowglobe Tin, filled with shortcake biscuits and featuring a snowglobe top.

The range, which starts from 50p for a pack of mini Christmas cards featuring the character, has been attracting a lot of attention on social media.

Article continues below

On one shopping page, where shoppers share their newest finds, a post featuring pictures of the various products attracted dozens of comments.

"I am in love with this range," said one Tesco shopper, with another adding: "My kids want all of this."

Commenting on the snowglobe tin, a third said: "If anyone can find one for me I’ll pay for it to be shipped. Can’t find them anywhere."

Article continues below

With his candy cane scarf and white frosty fluff, despite his name, the Abominable Snowman is a friendly, mountain creature who Tesco has brought to life for the winter months.

He can also be found on Christmas Eve boxes, tree decorations, wrapping paper and gift bags. The plush toy versions to snuggle up with are available both in medium and XL sizes, priced £7 and £15.

Article continues below

In clothing, babies can be kitted out in either a sweet sleepsuit or borg dungaree set, each featuring the Abominable Snowman.

Donna Bridgeman, head of design at Tesco, said “The design and development teams across Tesco and F&F came together and were inspired to create the friendly Christmas character by the insights that our customers are increasingly looking to seek out joy and fun through novelty products.

Article continues below

"We’ve loved seeing the Abominable Snowman come to life across all the different home, clothing and food products and hope he becomes friends with lots of Tesco shoppers over the festive season."
